title: Healthy Living - Canada.ca
content:
On the Health Canada Web site, each navigation section (listed on the left-hand side of the screen) has its own Contact us page. To find contact information for topics other than Healthy Living, visit the main contact us page .
Choose any of these topics for contact information:
- Assisted human reproduction
- Children and adolescents
- Healthy living strategy

## Assisted human reproduction
- For more information about assisted human reproduction, consult the Assisted human reproduction website .

## Children and adolescents
- For programs related to children's health and well-being, parenting, newborn care and pregnancy, contact the Division of Childhood and Adolescence of the Public Health Agency of Canada.
- Consult Canada food guide .
- For most nutrition and healthy eating inquiries, contact the Food and Nutrition Directorate (Bureau of Healthy Eating Policy and Promotion ).

## Healthy living strategy
- To obtain more details about the Integrated Pan-Canadian Healthy Living Strategy, consult the Healthy Living Strategy Web site or contact the Public Health Agency of Canada.
- For more information on mental health services, see the Public Health Agency of Canada's Mental health services page .
- Consult Canada 's physical activity guides .
- For tips and tools on how to be active, consult Canada's Guide to Healthy Eating and Physical Activity .
- For any other information related to physical activity, please contact the Physical Activity Unit of the Public Health Agency of Canada.
- For more information on product safety matters, please consult the Consumer Products Safety Contact us page.
- For more resources or information related to seniors, see the Public Health Agency of Canada's Aging and seniors page.
- To order a publication or obtain more information about sun safety, contact the Consumer and Clinical Radiation Protection Bureau .
- For more information on tobacco, please contact the Tobacco Control Directorate .
- Contact the Travelling Public Program for information about: Cruise Ship Inspection Program Passenger Train Inspection Program Flight Kitchen Food Safety Audit Program Ship Sanitation Certificate Program
- Cruise Ship Inspection Program
- Passenger Train Inspection Program
- Flight Kitchen Food Safety Audit Program
- Ship Sanitation Certificate Program
- For information about recent disease outbreaks in other countries, consult the Travel Health Advisories published by the Public Health Agency of Canada.
- For more information about Health Canada 's services and programs related to women's health, contact the Gender and Health Unit .
